P_defective.description: Prior probability that a product from the assembly line is defective (5%).

P_good.description: Prior probability that a product from the assembly line is good (95%), complement of P_defective.

P_test_defective_given_defective.description: Probability that the diagnostic test indicates defective given that the product is actually defective (92%).

P_test_defective_given_good.description: Probability that the diagnostic test indicates defective given that the product is actually good (4%), derived from the test indicating good 96% of the time for good products.
